creator: leeym@leeym.com
text:
Hi,

Please close ports/33223, lioux commited net/edonkey-{core,gui-gtk,gui-java}
in late January.
If somebody would like to create or maintain a port of edonkey-server,
please close ports/33222 as well.

Thanks.
